project.title: AI Removes Waiting, Not Judgment
project.style_notes: premium editorial motion short, illustrated cut-paper textures, charcoal and soft gold palette, bold silhouettes, clean overlay-ready compositions, no readable generated text
project.format_guidance: Compose for premium 9:16 vertical framing. Keep the main visual read centered, protect a raised lower subtitle-safe band, and leave clean negative space in proof beats for later overlays.
project.narration_style: calm, intelligent, understated English explainer with slight tension in the first line
project.narration_notes: Every line must be understood on first listen. One idea per line. Let compact timing remove dead air between beats.
project.consistency_notes: Keep one stylized operator silhouette, one modular workstation motif, and one limited palette across all shots. Favor illustrated readability and motion-graphic clarity over realism or fine human detail.
constraints: no readable on-screen text inside generated visuals
no visible lip-sync or spoken dialogue in frame
no close-up typing or finger detail
preserve the raised lower subtitle-safe band
project.audio_notes: restrained low synth pulse, paper-like swishes, soft impacts, and airy transitions under external narration only

characters.name: Guide Silhouette
characters.description: a simplified androgynous editorial silhouette with clean geometric proportions and no photoreal facial detail
continuity_rules: keep the same dark silhouette and gold accent across all shots
preserve clean geometric proportions and controlled movement
avoid realistic skin, detailed fingers, or celebrity likeness

shots.title: The old pressure changes shape
shots.subject: the guide silhouette inside a layered paper-cut workspace
shots.action: stands still while oversized chaotic cards fold into one clean vertical stack around them
shots.setting: illustrated studio made of modular panels, paper shadows, and abstract desks
shots.lighting: charcoal base with soft gold edge light and crisp silhouette separation
shots.camera_motion: slow push-in with a slight upward drift as the room simplifies
shots.start_frame: one stylized operator silhouette faces a wall of scattered cards, notes, and abstract blockers
shots.end_frame: the room resolves into one readable stack while the silhouette stays calm
shots.narration_cue: land engineering as the clutter folds into order
must_keep: no readable text anywhere in frame

shots.title: The blank page disappears first
shots.subject: a simplified monitor frame, notebook block, and the guide silhouette over one shoulder
shots.action: an empty panel resolves into three bold blocks while the silhouette stays mostly still
shots.setting: minimal illustrated workstation with one large clean panel and geometric desk props
shots.lighting: soft panel glow with low-contrast charcoal ambience
shots.start_frame: a clean over-shoulder workstation plate with a mostly empty rectangular panel
shots.end_frame: the panel remains unreadable but visually organized, ready for a real overlay in post
shots.narration_line: It removes the blank page first.
shots.narration_cue: land blank page as the panel resolves into structure
must_keep: no readable code or UI text
shots.post_notes: Replace the panel with a real screen capture in the final edit if exact proof is needed.

shots.title: Busywork stops hiding the real problem
shots.subject: repetitive task chips, tangled lines, and the guide silhouette
shots.action: small task chips and knotted lines peel away to reveal one bright clean route
shots.setting: stylized editorial space with floating cards, layered boards, and a single luminous path
shots.lighting: charcoal paper texture with brighter gold accents where the route clears
shots.camera_motion: slow orbital move ending on the revealed path
shots.start_frame: the silhouette is partially obscured by repetitive chips and tangled visual noise
shots.end_frame: one clear route remains and the silhouette is fully readable again
shots.narration_cue: land busywork as the clutter peels away

shots.title: Better engineers test more before the day ends
shots.subject: the guide silhouette beside one large clean review panel and smaller support tiles
shots.action: abstract tiles snap into a review layout while the silhouette observes rather than types
shots.setting: premium studio plate with one large clean panel and several soft-focus support blocks
shots.lighting: soft white panel light with restrained gold accents
shots.camera_motion: subtle side slide with no abrupt movement
shots.start_frame: one large clean panel dominates the frame with the silhouette in profile
shots.end_frame: the composition stays simple and overlay-ready for a real diff, test result, or deploy proof
shots.narration_line: Good engineers test more ideas, faster.
shots.narration_cue: land test more ideas as the main panel settles into place
must_keep: large clean panel reserved for post proof
shots.post_notes: Use this as a clean plate for a real test, diff, or deploy overlay when exact proof matters.

shots.title: The human decision stays central
shots.subject: the guide silhouette in front of a clean architecture wall
shots.action: studies several glowing routes and taps one path into focus while the others dim
shots.setting: minimal illustrated decision wall with luminous geometry and no labels
shots.lighting: soft gold highlight on the chosen path with low ambient charcoal fill
shots.camera_motion: slow push with a slight rise
shots.start_frame: the silhouette stands before several clean glowing routes
shots.end_frame: one route remains bright after a single deliberate decision
shots.narration_cue: land decides what ships on the final selected route

shots.title: The best engineers look bigger, not louder
shots.subject: the guide silhouette walking into a layered systems city made of modular shapes
shots.action: moves through a narrow corridor as the environment opens into a bright illustrated structure with elegant depth
shots.setting: futuristic but restrained motion-graphic hall built from clean modular panels and diagram shapes
shots.lighting: bright soft gold horizon against darker foreground depth
shots.camera_motion: smooth forward glide ending on a composed hero frame
shots.start_frame: the silhouette moves through a narrow dark passage made of layered paper panels
shots.end_frame: the silhouette stands inside a larger calm systems city, clearly ahead of the old workflow
shots.narration_line: That is why the best engineers feel bigger, not louder.
shots.narration_cue: land bigger, not louder on the clean final hero frame
